package rulefixtures

import (
	"os"
)

// scenario for range_over_local_channel_without_close: Functions that range over a locally owned channel without an observed close path.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: idioms; severity: info.
func scenario391Positive(paths []string) error {
	for _, path := range paths {
		file, err := os.Open(path)
		if err != nil { return err }
		defer file.Close()
	}
	return nil
}
